heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 2332 Authorization of appropriations
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this title”, meaning title LXXII of div. F of , known as the Fentanyl Sanctions Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 116–92Sections 1403, 4501, and section 7221, referred to in subsec. (b), mean sections sections 1403, 4501, and , respectively, which are not classified to the Code.section 7221 of Pub. L. 116–92

Change of NameCommittee on Oversight and Reform of House of Representatives changed to Committee on Oversight and Accountability of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Eighteenth Congress, .Jan. 9, 2023

children.heading: Department of the Treasury
children.label: a Department of the Treasury
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Secretary of the Treasury such sums as may be necessary for fiscal year 2020 to carry out operations and activities of the Department of the Treasury solely for purposes of carrying out this chapter.

children.heading: Commission on Combating Synthetic Opioid Trafficking
children.label: b Commission on Combating Synthetic Opioid Trafficking
children.text: Of the amount authorized to be appropriated by section 1403 for fiscal year 2020 [] and available for Drug Interdiction and Counter-Drug Activities, Defense-wide, as specified in the funding table in section 4501 [], the Secretary of Defense may, notwithstanding , transfer $5,000,000 to the Commission on Combating Synthetic Opioid Trafficking established under section 7221 [] in order to carry out the duties of the Commission.133 Stat. 1711133 Stat. 2086section 2215 of title 10133 Stat. 2270

children.heading: Supplement not supplant
children.label: c Supplement not supplant
children.text: Amounts authorized to be appropriated by subsection (a) shall supplement and not supplant other amounts available to carry out operations and activities described in such subsections.

children.heading: Notification requirement
children.label: d Notification requirement
children.text: Amounts authorized to be appropriated by subsection (a) may not be obligated until 15 days after the date on which the President notifies the appropriate committees of Congress of the President’s intention to obligate such funds.

children.heading: Appropriate committees of Congress defined
children.label: e Appropriate committees of Congress defined

children.text: the Committee on Armed Services, the Committee on Banking, Housing, and Urban Affairs, the Committee on Foreign Relations, the Select Committee on Intelligence, the Committee on the Judiciary, and the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate; and

the Committee on Armed Services, the Committee on Financial Services, the Committee on Foreign Affairs, the Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, the Committee on Oversight and Reform, and the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives.
